Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. LLM Architecture Gallery 91 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. A Visual Introduction to Machine Learning (2015) 288 upvotes, 26 comments
  3. Human Organ Atlas 75 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. In Memoriam: John W. Addison, my PhD advisor 66 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. Examples for the tcpdump and dig man pages 84 upvotes, 7 comments
  6. //go:fix inline and the source-level inliner 54 upvotes, 5 comments
  7. Learning athletic humanoid tennis skills from imperfect human motion data 92 upvotes, 15 comments
  8. Animated 'Firefly' Reboot in Development from Nathan Fillion, 20th TV 59 upvotes, 12 comments
  9. Kniterate Notes 49 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. Let your Coding Agent debug the browser session with Chrome DevTools MCP 154 upvotes, 44 comments
  11. Show HN: Signet – Autonomous wildfire tracking from satellite and weather data 98 upvotes, 27 comments
  12. Show HN: GDSL – 800 line kernel: Lisp subset in 500, C subset in 1300 47 upvotes, 11 comments
  13. IBM, sonic delay lines, and the history of the 80×24 display (2019) 66 upvotes, 20 comments
  14. Generating All 32-Bit Primes (Part I) 69 upvotes, 22 comments
  15. Why Mathematica does not simplify sinh(arccosh(x)) 136 upvotes, 54 comments
  16. Bus travel from Lima to Rio de Janeiro 70 upvotes, 26 comments
  17. Separating the Wayland compositor and window manager 152 upvotes, 67 comments
  18. Show HN: What if your synthesizer was powered by APL (or a dumb K clone)? 66 upvotes, 28 comments
  19. Office.eu launches as Europe's sovereign office platform 203 upvotes, 112 comments
  20. C++26: The Oxford Variadic Comma 75 upvotes, 36 comments
  21. Autoresearch Hub 24 upvotes, 8 comments
  22. Glassworm Is Back: A New Wave of Invisible Unicode Attacks Hits Repositories 165 upvotes, 97 comments
  23. The 49MB Web Page 108 upvotes, 65 comments
  24. Grandparents are glued to their phones, families are worried [video] 142 upvotes, 96 comments
  25. What makes Intel Optane stand out (2023) 149 upvotes, 104 comments
  26. Measure of Justice: Covering the Cerîde-I Adliye Covers (2017) 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. $96 3D-printed rocket that recalculates its mid-air trajectory using a $5 sensor 343 upvotes, 319 comments
  28. The 100 hour gap between a vibecoded prototype and a working product 210 upvotes, 277 comments
  29. Ask HN: How is AI-assisted coding going for you professionally? 106 upvotes, 164 comments
  30. Hollywood Enters Oscars Weekend in Existential Crisis 92 upvotes, 305 comments

Last generated 5:30am, 16 March 2026. Source here.
